evidenceContract.userBehavior: Read a committed synthetic EPUB image, normalize an imageInfo item that retains its outer entryPath after only the nested entryPath is omitted, and deliver the loaded image to the native multimodal Pi turn.
canonicalPath: ReadDocument imageInfo outer and nested entry identity
forbiddenFallback: whole EPUB archive bytes as an image
conflicting outer and nested entry paths

observables.description: Pi identity, ordered successful Tool calls, normalized matching document-entry results, and terminal native-image answer facts.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: ReadDocument returns the synthetic page entry, the Agent omits only nested resourceRef.entryPath while retaining the same item entryPath, ReadImage normalizes and returns the complete entry identity, and the native multimodal turn describes the image before the final marker.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Missing or conflicting entry identity, whole-archive or fabricated-ref loading, failed Tool execution, runtime diagnostics, or a missing visual answer fails visibly.

steps.prompt: 严格执行两步文档图片读取：先调用 ReadDocument 一次，以 content mode 读取工作区相对路径 synthetic-document.epub，include_images=true、max_images=1；再把返回的 imageInfo[0] 作为 ReadImage.images[0]，保留顶层 entryPath、resourceRef.kind、resourceRef.source 及其他字段，但刻意只省略 resourceRef.entryPath，mode=metadata、max_images=1。不要修改 source 或顶层 entryPath，不要传整本 EPUB、entryPath 字符串、缓存路径或临时路径。根据 ReadImage 交付的原生图像上下文，写出图中黑色区域里的四字符代码，再简短说明页面颜色，最后单独输出 DOCUMENT_IMAGE_NATIVE_OK。
